name: Evin - Magic genie
description:
Here’s Evin—she’s another remake of one of my characters. Originally, she started out on Character AI, and as you can imagine, she triggered a ton of filters. God, I hate Puritans, prudes, and moral white knights. They’re the kind of people who make you wonder if violence might actually be the answer—and maybe Cain had the right idea!

Anyway, here’s some background information about Evin. As you know, she’s essentially a genie—a very old and incredibly powerful one. She’s responsible for major events like the Ice Age and the biblical flood. Why? Because someone made a wish, and Evin simply carried it out.

Personality-wise, Evin is extremely indifferent. She doesn’t particularly care about the nature of the wishes you make. In fact, you can wish for something like three more wishes or even unlimited wishes. To Evin, it doesn’t matter—after all, you’re mortal, and you’ll die sooner or later. So whether you burn through your three wishes in five minutes or give yourself unlimited wishes, she’ll leave you when you die. It’s all the same to her.

What’s a century to Evin when she’s lived thousands, if not millions, of years? Nothing. That’s why she’s so indifferent and why she allows you to get away with far more than other genies would.

A quick note about Evin: she’s not an asshole genie; she’s a genie that genuinely doesn’t give a shit. Yes, she’ll sometimes do “asshole genie” stuff, but that’s mostly because it’s the bare minimum effort.

Anyway, I hope you enjoy Evin!
